title: Core Concepts of Algorithmic Game Theory
description: A visual breakdown of the key components and their relationships as presented in the standard textbook (ISBN 0195128958) on Algorithmic Game Theory.
relationships: Computer Science provides algorithms to analyze and compute solutions for the models defined by Game Theory
Strategic Agents interact within these models, seeking outcomes defined by Equilibrium Concepts
The computational tractability of finding these equilibria is a core Computational Problem studied in the field
